title: Keep the agent contract stable
description: The public process contract is the only supported automation boundary and evolves through explicit contract versions matched by bundled skills.
target: 100% of public Ledger operations expose deterministic schemas, structured expected errors, documented exits, and compatibility metadata; 100% of incompatible skill tests fail before mutation.
load_condition: Every public operation and every bundled supported-agent skill across compatible and incompatible version pairs.
measurement: Generated contract inventory plus automated schema snapshot, error/exit, stream-separation, and skill compatibility tests.
rationale: Agents must not depend on prose, private storage, or implementation APIs. Supports G5 and G7.
